		building_type:woodhenge_of_cahokia = { lsq_auto_build_check_clergy_available_or_will_be = yes }
		building_type:yakata = { lsq_auto_build_check_nobles_available_or_will_be = yes }
		building_type:yamashiro = { lsq_auto_build_check_soldiers_available_or_will_be = yes }
		building_type:zazzau_walls = { lsq_auto_build_check_soldiers_available_or_will_be = yes }
		building_type:zeeland_admiralty = { lsq_auto_build_check_soldiers_available_or_will_be = yes }
		building_type:zhixian = { lsq_auto_build_check_nobles_available_or_will_be = yes }
		building_type:zwinger = { lsq_auto_build_check_nobles_available_or_will_be = yes }
		fallback = { always = no }
	}
}
